- Add milks late: Stir in coconut/almond/cashew milk or yogurt in the last 15–20 minutes to prevent curdling.
- Boost umami (plant‑based): Add tomato paste, soy/tamari, miso, mushrooms, sun‑dried tomatoes, or a splash of kombu dashi.
- Finish bright and textured: Right before serving, add lemon/lime, fresh herbs, and a crunchy topper (toasted nuts/seeds, crispy shallots).
- Calibrate your cooker: Do a water test once—on HIGH, 4–5 hours should reach ~200°F; on LOW, ~185°F. Helps set realistic timings.
